channel.title: Posts on Ali Chaghani
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Ali Chaghani

item.title: Magic Square
item.description: A magic square is a \(n\ x\ n\) matrix with the numbers 1, 2, 3,…,n^2. Where the sum of the elements in each row, column, and in the two diagonals equal the same value. For example, look at the picture below, it is a 3x3 matrix filled with the numbers 1 through 9 and you see that each row, column and both diagonals each 15.

item.title: Hello R Markdown
item.description: R Markdown This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com. You can embed an R code chunk like this: summary(cars) ## speed dist ## Min. : 4.0 Min. : 2.00 ## 1st Qu.:12.0 1st Qu.: 26.00 ## Median :15.0 Median : 36.00 ## Mean :15.4 Mean : 42.98 ## 3rd Qu.
